svg.title: HORUS camera transport benchmark
svg.desc: Mode B comparison of ROS 2 DDS, ROS 2 Zenoh bridge, and WebRTC H.264 camera transport at 1080p30 and 720p30.

text.font-family: Inter, SF Pro Display, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif
Inter, SF Pro Display, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Mode B best practical paths: compressed ROS images over DDS/Zenoh and H.264 over WebRTC.

text.font-family: Inter, SF Pro Display, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 120 s per point, 30 FPS source, 150 ms fresh-frame deadline. Lines compare LAN, VPN, and cloud hub.

svg.text: Fresh-frame SLA = frames received under the 150 ms deadline divided by captured frames. Stale and dropped frames count as failures.

text.font-family: Inter, SF Pro Display, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Clock offset is measured before each run with the probe artifact when available; the renderer does not subtract a percentile baseline.
